Curriculum Vitae

Education

    Advisors: Daniele Condorelli, Motty Perry

Research Interests

Microeconomic Theory, Game Theory, Contract Design, Communication, Misspecified Games

Working Papers

  • (Dis-)agreement in Misspecified Games (2026)
  • Pay to Quit (with Hyungmin Park, 2025)

Publications

  • Vertical Mergers in Ecosystems with Consumer Hold-Up
    with Daniele Condorelli, Jorge Padilla
    Journal of Industrial Economics, 2024

Presentations

  • 2026: Warwick MWIP, PhD Microeconomic Theory Workshop at LSE, EARIE, EETC

  • 2024: Warwick MWIP

Teaching
